headline: Intercontinental Exchange’s (ICE) Strategic Move in Predictive Markets
summary: Manole Capital Management, an investment management company, focused on covering the Financial and Technology sectors, released its second quarter 2026 investor letter. In volatile market conditions, the strategy has performed well amid unexpected geopolitical tensions. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. headline: Cboe Global Stock Lags Industry, Trades at a Discount: Time to Buy?
summary: Cboe Global's discounted valuation, diversified revenues, higher growth targets and bullish estimates make the stock look compelling.

headline: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Plans GPU Compute Futures With NATIVX To Trade AI Power
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) plans to launch GPU compute futures contracts in partnership with NATIVX. The new contracts are designed to create a regulated market for trading the future price of AI compute power. The product is expected to sit alongside ICE's existing energy futures, including power and natural gas. Intercontinental Exchange is known for running global exchanges and clearing houses, and for building benchmarks across asset classes. With AI infrastructure becoming a...
